posId.name: posId
posId.description: Shop identification number (defaults to merchant ID)

amount.name: amount
amount.description: Transaction amount expressed in lowest currency unit, e.g. 1.23 PLN = 123

currency.name: currency
currency.description: Currency compatible with ISO, e.g. PLN

country.name: country
country.description: Country codes compatible with  ISO, e.g. PL, DE, etc.

phone.name: phone
phone.description: Customer's telephone in the following format:  481321132123

language.name: language
language.description: One of following language codes according to ISO 639-1: bg, cs, de, en, es, fr, hr, hu, it, nl, pl, pt, se, sk, ro

method.name: method
method.description: Payment method ID. List of payment methods provided in the panel or available through API

urlReturn.name: urlReturn
urlReturn.description: URL address to which customer will be redirected when transaction is complete

urlStatus.name: urlStatus
urlStatus.description: URL address to which transaction status will be send

timeLimit.name: timeLimit
timeLimit.description: Time limit for transaction process, 0 - no limit, max. 99 (in minutes)

channel.name: channel
channel.description:
1 - card + ApplePay + GooglePay, 2 - transfer, 4 - traditional transfer, 8 - N/A, 16 - all 24/7 – makes available all payment methods, 32 - use pre-payment, 64 – only pay-by-link methods, 128 – instalment payment forms, 256 – wallets, 4096 - card, 8192 - blik, 16384 - all methods except blik

To activate the specific channels, their values should be summed up.

Example: transfer and traditional transfer: channel=6

transferLabel.name: transferLabel
transferLabel.description: Description forwarded to transfer's description (not in every payment methods). A parameter can contain values only ​​in a range [a-z A-Z 0-9 ęółśążźćńĘÓŁŚĄŻŹĆŃ . / :- ]

sdkVersion.name: sdkVersion
sdkVersion.description: Version of mobile library. Determines if transaction is mobile.

sign.name: sign
sign.description:
Checksum of parameters:
{"sessionId":"string","merchantId":int,"amount":int,"currency":"string","crc":"string"}

calculated with the use of sha384

IMPORTANT!:
in case json_encode function is used, the following attributes should be added
"JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES"

encoding.name: encoding
encoding.description: Coding system for characters sent: ISO-8859-2, UTF-8, Windows-1250

methodRefId.name: methodRefId
methodRefId.description: Special parameter for some payment flows e.g. BLIK and Card one-click.

iban.description: Międzynarodowy numer rachunku bankowego IBAN (international bank account number)
